title: Employee Satisfaction Survey
intro: This survey gathers how you feel about your role, your team, your managers, growth opportunities, and overall satisfaction, so we can build a better workplace. All responses are confidential — your identity is not linked to your answers.

questions.text: The Company clearly conveys its mission to its employees.
The Company clearly conveys the mission to its clients.
I agree with the Company's overall mission.
I understand how my job aligns with the Company's mission.
I feel like I am a part of the Company.
There is good communication from employees to managers in the Company.
There is good communication from managers to employees in the Company.
People in my department communicate sufficiently with one another.
My job gives me the opportunity to learn.
I have the tools and resources I need to do my job.
I have the training I need to do my job.
I receive the right amount of recognition for my work.
I am aware of the advancement opportunities that exist in the Company for me.
I feel well utilized in my job.
The amount of work expected of me is reasonable.
It is easy to get along with my colleagues.
The morale in my department is high.
Overall, my supervisor does a good job.
My supervisor actively listens to my suggestions.
My supervisor enables me to perform at my best.
My supervisor promotes an atmosphere of teamwork.
It is clear to me what my supervisor expects of me regarding my job performance.
My supervisor evaluates my work performance on a regular basis.
My supervisor provides me with actionable suggestions on what I can do to improve.
When I have questions or concerns, my supervisor is able to address them.
I feel that my salary package matches my workload.
There is regular improvement in my salary (increment).
I am satisfied with the transportation allowance/services provided by the company.
I am satisfied with the accommodation allowance/services provided by the company.
I am satisfied with the welfare activities implemented by the company.
I am satisfied with the services of the medical insurance.
I am satisfied with the attention and assistance of the HR & Admin Department.
I will refer my friends to work in the company.
I am confident to serve long years with the company.
I am proud to be part of the company.
